responses: Hello! I can help you with government services, scholarships, Aadhaar, PAN card and more. What do you need?

MahaDBT Scholarship Process:
1. Visit mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in
2. Click New Applicant Registration
3. Enter Aadhaar and mobile number
4. Verify OTP and create login
5. Fill personal and academic details
6. Enter bank account details
7. Upload: Aadhaar, income certificate, caste certificate, marksheet, bank passbook
8. Submit and note application ID
Helpline: 1800-120-8040

Aadhaar Services:
1. Download e-Aadhaar: myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in
2. Update details: Visit Aadhaar Seva Kendra
3. New registration: Visit enrollment center
4. Biometric lock: myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in
Helpline: 1947

PAN Card Process:
1. Visit onlineservices.nsdl.com
2. Click Apply Online under PAN
3. Fill Form 49A
4. Upload photo, signature, ID proof
5. Pay Rs.110 fee
6. Track with acknowledgment number
Helpline: 020-27218080

Ration Card Maharashtra:
1. Visit rcms.mahafood.gov.in
2. Click New Ration Card Application
3. Fill family and address details
4. Upload: Aadhaar, address proof, income proof
5. Inspector will verify at home
6. Card issued within 30 days
Helpline: 1967

Driving Licence Process:
1. Visit parivahan.gov.in
2. Apply for Learner Licence first
3. Book and pass LL test at RTO
4. After 30 days apply for Permanent DL
5. Pass driving test at RTO
6. DL delivered to address
Documents: Age proof, Address proof, Aadhaar, Photo

Voter ID Process:
1. Visit voters.eci.gov.in
2. Click Register as New Voter
3. Fill Form 6 online
4. Upload: Age proof, Address proof, Photo
5. BLO will verify at address
6. Voter ID issued within 30 days
Helpline: 1950

Passport Process:
1. Visit passportindia.gov.in
2. Register and fill application
3. Book appointment at PSK
4. Visit with original documents
5. Police verification done
6. Passport in 30-45 days
Helpline: 1800-258-1800

Income Certificate:
1. Visit aaplesarkar.mahaonline.gov.in
2. Search Income Certificate
3. Fill family income details
4. Upload: Aadhaar, ration card, salary slip
5. Certificate in 7-15 days
Or visit nearest Seva Kendra

Caste Certificate:
1. Visit aaplesarkar.mahaonline.gov.in
2. Select Caste Certificate
3. Fill caste details
4. Upload: Aadhaar, ration card, school certificate, father caste proof
5. Certificate in 15-30 days
Helpline: 1800-120-8040

Emergency Numbers:
🚨 All Emergencies: 112
🚔 Police: 100
🚑 Ambulance: 102
🔥 Fire: 101
👩 Women Helpline: 1091
🧒 Child Helpline: 1098
💻 Cyber Crime: 1930
Call 112 for immediate emergency!

Report Cyber Crime:
1. Call 1930 IMMEDIATELY for financial fraud
2. Visit cybercrime.gov.in
3. Fill complaint with screenshots and transaction details
4. Note complaint number
For UPI/Bank Fraud call 1930 immediately!
I can help with: Aadhaar, PAN card, Ration card, MahaDBT scholarship, Driving Licence, Voter ID, Passport, Emergency numbers. What do you need?
Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything else.
I can help with: Aadhaar, PAN card, Ration card, MahaDBT scholarship, Driving Licence, Voter ID, Passport, RTI, Cyber crime and Emergency numbers. Please ask about these!
